recommendations.title: Marry Me
recommendations.overview: After finding out about her fiancé's cheating ways, a pop superstar impulsively marries a total stranger. They must soon decide if two people from such different worlds can find true love.

recommendations.overview: A comedy centered on two best friends, Kim and Deena, who fight to maintain normalcy in their lives after Kim gets pregnant and has a baby.

recommendations.title: And While We Were Here
recommendations.overview: Trapped in a loveless marriage, a troubled writer experiences a sexual awakening when she meets a carefee American in Italy.

recommendations.title: The Grapes of Death
recommendations.overview: A young woman discovers that the pesticide being sprayed on vineyards is turning people into murderous lunatics.

recommendations.title: Painless
recommendations.overview: While searching for a solution to his serious health condition, David, a renowned neurosurgeon, discovers a sinister secret hidden in the past.

recommendations.title: The Nightmare
recommendations.overview: Eight people experience sleep paralysis, a condition which leaves them unable to move, speak or react.

recommendations.title: White Noise 2: The Light
recommendations.overview: A man's family brought back from the verge of death, he then discovers he can identify people who are about to die.
